assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Step 4.1 clearly shows control plane upgrade first with gcloud container clusters upgrade --master command before any node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends upgrade order: coordinating nodes (least critical), then data nodes (most critical), then master nodes (quorum critical) with detailed rationale provided

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Multiple mentions that regional pd-ssd will reattach to replacement nodes in the same region, and troubleshooting section addresses PV reattachment scenarios

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Step 3 includes complete PDB YAML configuration with minAvailable: 2 for master nodes to maintain 2/3 quorum

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Recommends maxSurge=0, maxUnavailable=1 for master/data nodes and maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for coordinating nodes, but not maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for ALL node pools as specified

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Each node pool upgrade section includes cluster health checks with curl commands to verify ES cluster status between upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: Does not mention checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain anywhere in the response

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: Does not include any kubectl rollout status commands for StatefulSets, focuses on node status and ES health checks instead

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Does not mention taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting the upgrade process
